hero.title: About RelaxPro
hero.subtitle: Telangana and AP's first pure latex mattress company

ourStory.title: Telangana and AP's first pure latex mattress company

children.text: RelaxPro handcrafts natural latex sleep systems for South India, delivered direct from our Kerala factory with transparent pricing and no synthetic fillers. Founded by Suresh, a third-generation rubber goods manufacturer, the brand was built to solve a problem he saw everywhere: families paying luxury prices for mattresses filled with industrial chemicals.

Every RelaxPro mattress starts as tapped latex from smallholder farms in Kerala. The sap is processed through the Dunlop method — a century-old technique that preserves the latex's natural cellular structure without synthetic stabilizers. The result is a material that breathes, rebounds, and stays supportive for over a decade.

ourProcess.title: From plantation to bedroom in fourteen days

steps.title: Latex Tapping
steps.description: At 4 AM each morning, tappers move through the plantation making clean diagonal cuts in the bark. The raw latex flows into collection cups and is transported to our unit within hours — before polymerization begins.

steps.title: Dunlop Processing
steps.description: Back at the factory, the latex is filtered, whiped, and baked in the Dunlop mold. Each core block is then washed, tested for density consistency, and fitted with GOTS-certified organic cotton covers before being compression-rolled and shipped.

steps.title: Washing & Testing
steps.description: Each core block is washed in purified water, then tested for density consistency across every inch. Only blocks that pass our 95+ density read threshold move forward to the finishing line.

steps.title: Covering & Rolling
steps.description: The foam core is fitted with a GOTS-certified organic cotton quilted cover, then compression-rolled and packed in a travel-ready carry bag — ready to ship anywhere in India.

certifications.title: The certifications on every RelaxPro mattress

items.name: GOLS
items.description: Global Organic Latex Standard — certifies that the latex in every RelaxPro core is at least 95% organic, harvested from sustainably managed rubber plantations without prohibited chemicals.

items.name: Oeko-Tex Standard 100
items.description: Certifies that all fabrics in direct contact with skin are tested against a list of 350+ harmful substances. Product Class IV — safe even for baby skin contact.

items.name: FSC
items.description: Forest Stewardship Council label for sustainably managed rubber forestry. A third independent audit of the supply chain from tree to mattress.

values.missionStatement: Luxury branding in India typically leans on superlatives: "best," "ultimate," "world-class." RelaxPro does not. We describe what the mattress is made of, how it is made, and what price it is sold for. That restraint is the brand. Three certifications back every product: GOLS for organic latex integrity, Oeko-Tex for fabric safety, and FSC for sustainable rubber sourcing. These credentials are stated once, not repeated on every product card.

valueCards.title: Radical Transparency
valueCards.description: Every material, every layer density, every certification is disclosed openly. We describe what the mattress is — not what we want it to sound like.

valueCards.title: Sustainable by Default
valueCards.description: 100% biodegradable latex, sustainably harvested. No synthetic fillers, no flame retardant chemicals, no throwaway mattresses every five years.

valueCards.title: Factory-First Customer Service
valueCards.description: If you walk into our Jeedimetla showroom, Suresh or a trained team member will spend twenty minutes talking through layer density, sleep posture, and medical considerations — not closing a sale.

valueCards.title: Made for Indian Backs
valueCards.description: Designed and tested in South India for Indian body types, Indian climate, and Indian beds — not imported foam rebranded for the Indian market.

teamSection.title: From our factory in Jeedimetla, Hyderabad

children.text: If you walk into our Jeedimetla showroom, Suresh or a trained team member will spend twenty minutes talking through layer density, sleep posture, and medical considerations — not closing a sale. If you prefer WhatsApp, the same detail is there.
RelaxPro is manufactured at our integrated rubber goods facility in Jeedimetla Industrial Area, Hyderabad — with dedicated latex processing, foam molding, quilting, and quality testing lines.

seo.metaTitle: About RelaxPro | Pure Natural Latex Mattress Manufacturer
seo.metaDescription: Pioneering GOLS chemical-free natural organic latex mattresses in Andhra Pradesh, Telangana and Karnataka. Factory direct with zero markups. Founded by Suresh, third-generation rubber manufacturer.
